about.title: About Yumo Yumo
about.description: A personal financial operating system built on Proof of Expense. Upload eligible receipts, build price memory, and create contribution records that can support future token rails when enabled.
about.description1: Yumo Yumo turns receipts, routines, and price changes into living financial memory with Yumbie as your guide.
about.description2: Yumo Yumo is in beta. Upload eligible receipts, improve your price memory, and build contribution history inside the product.

footer.description: Build price memory, understand the rhythm of your spending, and feed Yumbie with better data.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Yumo Yumo. All rights reserved. Built with love and Yumbies.

faq.title: Yumo Yumo FAQ
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers! 😊
faq.contactText: Slide into our DMs or tweet us — we love chatting! ❤️

items.question: What's Yumo Yumo all about?
items.answer: We're the friend who finally shows you what's really hiding in your shopping receipts! 🧾✨ Yumo Yumo turns everyday spending into fun insights and eligible in-app rewards. Upload a receipt, uncover hidden costs (taxes, markups, all that sneaky stuff), and become smarter with your money.

items.question: How does it actually work? Sounds too good!
items.answer: Super simple — promise! 1. Connect your wallet (no complicated sign-up). 2. Snap a photo of any eligible receipt (coffee, groceries, online shopping…). 3. Our Proof of Expense (PoE) magic reveals the hidden layers. 4. You get a cute breakdown and app reward records when you qualify. That's it! 🎉

items.question: Okay, but what are these "hidden costs" everyone keeps talking about?
items.answer: Think of them as the invisible extras baked into every price: Taxes & duties 🏛️, Logistics and shipping 🚚, Inflation vibes 📈, Brand & market markups 💸. We show you roughly how much of your total goes to these — so you finally understand why that burger costs more here than there!

items.question: Is this financial advice? Should I change my life now? 😅
items.answer: Nope! We're here to help you see clearer, not tell you what to do. The insights are just educated estimates to spark curiosity and awareness — definitely not official financial advice. You're still the boss of your wallet! 👑

items.question: How do I earn rewards? Tell me the fun part!
items.answer: Two super sweet ways: cPoints 🍪 → app records from eligible real-life receipts, and cPoints 🎈 → app records from eligible community activity (quests). They are non-transferable unless and until a future token program is enabled, and any claim will be subject to eligibility, updated terms, and legal checks.

items.question: What's YUMO token? Is it going to the moon? 🚀
items.answer: YUMO is planned as a utility token for eligible ecosystem features. Claim, transfer, staking, governance, and distribution details are not live yet and may change based on product readiness, legal review, jurisdiction, sanctions screening, and updated Token & Rewards Terms.

items.question: Will I get rich quick?
items.answer: Let's be real — no promises of moonshots here. 😌 Rewards come from real activity, not speculation. Think of it as getting a little thank-you every time you spend money you were already spending.

items.question: How do you keep everything fair and sustainable?
items.answer: We're kinda proud of this part! Everything is rule-based (no secret minting). Emissions slow down as more people join. Anti-abuse safeguards everywhere. It grows with real use, not farming bots. Sustainable vibes only ♻️

items.question: What about my privacy? You're seeing my receipts! 😳
items.answer: We care a lot about this! We only process what's needed to give you insights and rewards. Anything used to improve the system is fully anonymized. Your wallet address is public on-chain (normal for Web3), but personal details stay private. Full transparency in our Privacy Policy — feel free to read it with your favorite snack.

items.question: Can literally anyone join?
items.answer: As long as you're of legal age in your country and crypto is okay where you live — yes! 🌍 (Some features might be limited in certain regions because of local rules — boring but necessary.)

items.question: Airdrop? Free tokens? 🤑
items.answer: No guaranteed airdrop, free token, claim, transfer, or cash value. Any future token or reward event will require eligibility, wallet and jurisdiction checks, anti-fraud review, and separate Token & Rewards Terms.

items.question: When can I start using it?
items.answer: App is cooking in the oven! 🔥 Whitepaper is out now, early access coming soon. Follow us on X for the freshest updates — we'll shout when it's ready!

items.question: Why isn't there a marketing budget?
items.answer: Yumo Yumo doesn't grow by dumping money into boring ads! 🙅‍♂️ It grows because friends like you use it and share the love. We'd rather reward our early helpers and creators than pay big corporations. It's healthier, human-driven, and way more fun! 💖

items.question: Does the team keep a "team allocation"?
items.answer: Nope! There are no secret pockets or hidden stashes here. 🙅‍♀️ The team earns exactly like you do—by building, running, and improving the system. If Yumo Yumo doesn't deliver real value, nobody earns. We grow together or not at all! 🤝✨

items.question: Wait—is the team working for free?
items.answer: Not exactly! 😸 We work for the real-world adoption of tools people actually want to use. Our rewards are tied to shipping useful features and keeping the network happy. If people love using it, we all win! 🍎✨

items.question: Where can I learn more or ask silly questions?
items.answer: Whitepaper (deep dive), X (@yumohq) — we're super chatty there, Website: yumoyumo.com, Discord/Telegram coming soon! Got a question that's not here? Slide into our DMs or tweet us — we love chatting! 💬❤️

sections.title: 1. So… what is Yumo Yumo?
content: Yumo Yumo is a Web3 project that turns eligible everyday receipts into in-app contribution records:
Spending money.
Every price has layers.
Taxes, profit margins, operational costs...
You pay all of them every day, without thinking.
Yumo Yumo looks at these layers and says:
"Great! Let's turn this into useful contribution data."

sections.title: 2. Why should anyone care?
content: Because almost all financial tools ask this boring question:
"How much did you spend?"
Yumo Yumo asks something better:
"What was actually inside that price?"
Once you start looking at prices this way, spending stops being a passive action.
It becomes data.
And eligible data can create in-app rewards.

sections.title: 3. Proof of Expense (PoE)
content: PoE (Proof of Expense) is simple and honest.
You upload a real receipt.
The system analyzes what's inside the price.
Hidden costs come to light.
You can receive in-app reward records because you provided eligible real-world data.
No fake actions.
No button clicking with bots.
No rewards that come "just from feelings".
If you spend in real life, you may be able to contribute eligible data on Yumo Yumo.

sections.title: 4. Data Contribution, but make it normal life
content: Forget GPUs.
Forget warehouses full of machines.
In Yumo Yumo, your receipts are your data contribution.
Every valid receipt adds a signal to the system.
Every eligible signal can create in-app reward records.
The cycle is clean:
Spend → Upload → Validate → Reward
You were already doing step one anyway.

sections.title: 5. About tokens (community first)
content: Let's be clear:
No separate passive team allocation.
No hidden stash.
No massive budgets set aside for marketing.
No pre-minting tokens for insiders.
If token rails are enabled, the published allocation map and contribution rules determine the flow.
Yumo Yumo was built so contribution stays inspectable and product rules stay transparent.
If you contribute eligible activity, you may qualify for in-app contribution records.
If activity is not eligible, it does not qualify.
That's it.

sections.title: 6. "But how is this funded?"
content: It's not funded the usual way.
No massive marketing budgets.
No paid advertising machines.
No artificial demand.
Yumo Yumo grows through the Web3 way:
Through participation, contribution, and shared incentives.
Value comes from what people do, not from team promises.

sections.title: 7. Why Web3 at all?
content: Because rules matter more than people.
Web3 guarantees:
Rewards follow predefined logic.
Distribution cannot be changed manually.
No one behind the curtain can decide "who gets what".
Spending becomes a shared signal.
Future token functionality, if enabled, will be gated by eligibility and updated terms.
Simple systems survive.
Non-transparent ones get eliminated.

sections.title: 8. Who is this actually for?
content: People who spend money.
Those who love contributing data but also want to sleep.
Those who prefer rules over stories.
You don't need to trade.
You don't need to use leverage.
You don't need to predict charts.
Just upload receipts.

sections.title: 9. The bigger picture
content: Yumo Yumo starts with awareness.
Over time, this awareness becomes:
Deeper insights.
Smarter financial tools.
A growing ecosystem built on real spending data.
All supported by the people who actually spend the money.

sections.title: 10. Final thought
content: Money already leaves your wallet every day.
Yumo Yumo doesn't try to stop that.
It lets eligible receipts become contribution signals while it happens.
The cycle: Spend ➔ Upload ➔ Validate ➔ Reward
That's the cycle.

cta.title: Ready to get into the kitchen?
cta.description: Take a much deeper dive into technical specifications, mathematical details of tokenomics, and implementation processes.

terms.title: Yumo Yumo Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Hey there! Welcome to Yumo Yumo — we're super happy you're here.
terms.introDescription: These Terms are like the friendly rules of our little clubhouse. By using our app, website, or services (we call them all "Services"), you're saying "okay!" to these rules. If something doesn't feel right, no worries — just don't use the Services.

sections.title: 1. Who can join the fun?
sections.content: You need to be at least 18 (or the grown-up age where you live). We want everyone to be able to make their own choices responsibly.

sections.title: 2. Your account & wallet
sections.content:
When you connect your Web3 wallet, keep it safe — it's like your house key! 🔑

We're not responsible if someone else uses it without your permission. If something seems off, tell us right away.

sections.title: 3. What can you do here?
sections.content: Upload eligible receipts, discover hidden costs with Proof of Expense (PoE), see cute spending insights, and collect non-transferable cPoints app records when you qualify. Future token features, if enabled, will require separate eligibility and terms.

sections.title: 4. Receipts & your stuff
sections.content:
When you upload receipts or other content, you're letting us use it (in a safe, anonymized way) to give you insights and make the app better for everyone.

Promise us they're yours to share and don't break any rules or hurt anyone's feelings, okay?

sections.title: 5. Rewards & YUMO tokens
content: cPoints are non-transferable in-app records tied to eligible activity.
They do not guarantee any token claim, airdrop, transfer, listing, cash value, profit, or exchangeability.
YUMO is planned as a utility token for eligible app functionality — not investment advice, a security offering, or a "get rich quick" ticket.

Eligibility rules may change. We may withhold, reverse, or suspend rewards for fraud, duplicate activity, sanctions risk, legal restrictions, or policy violations. Any taxes on rewards are your responsibility.

sections.title: 6. Please be kind (things we don't like)
content: No fake receipts, no trying to game the system, no illegal stuff, no bullying, no hacking.
If something feels wrong, we might pause or say goodbye to your account — but we'd rather everyone plays nicely!

sections.title: 7. Our stuff stays ours
sections.content: The app design, code, and ideas belong to us (or our friends who helped). You get to use them for personal fun, but no copying or selling, pretty please.

sections.title: 8. Privacy — we've got your back
sections.content: We take your privacy seriously (and cutely). Everything is explained in our Privacy Policy — give it a read with your favorite drink.

sections.title: 9. Third-party friends (wallets, blockchains)
sections.content: We team up with other tools (like wallets and blockchains). They're awesome, but we can't promise they'll always work perfectly. On-chain stuff is forever and public — that's just how blockchain rolls.

sections.title: 10. Heads up — no guarantees & NFA 🙈
content: We do our best to make everything smooth and accurate, but:

items.label: Friendly Guesses Only:
items.text: Hidden cost estimates and spending insights are friendly guesses to help you learn. They are not financial, investment, or legal advice (NFA!). Always do your own research. 🔍

items.label: Services are "as is":
items.text: We try to be perfect, but we can't make "perfect promises" about everything working 100% of the time. 💫

items.label: Crypto Adventures:
items.text: Crypto has ups and downs — you know the drill. Any moves you make are your own responsibility. 🎢

sections.title: 11. If something goes wrong 🤗
sections.content: We really hope nothing does, but if there's an issue, our responsibility is limited (to the max the law allows). We're not liable for indirect stuff — let's keep things positive! ✨

sections.title: 12. Crypto realities (the serious but honest part) 🪙
sections.content: Tokens can lose value, transactions can't be undone, and rules can change in different countries. YUMO is planned as a utility token, not an investment ticket. No claim, airdrop, transfer, exchange listing, or profit is promised. Join only if you're comfortable with how blockchain works and the eligibility rules that may apply! 🌊

sections.title: 13. Pausing or saying goodbye
sections.content: We might pause or close accounts if needed (we'll try to be fair). If that happens, unclaimed, ineligible, fraudulent, or legally restricted rewards may be withheld, reversed, or expire.

sections.title: 14. The grown-up legal bit
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, unless mandatory local law provides otherwise. If a disagreement comes up, we will try to resolve it first; if needed, disputes will be handled by the competent courts or forums available under applicable law.

sections.title: 15. We might update these rules
sections.content: If we make changes, we'll let you know. Keep using the app = you're cool with the new version.

sections.title: 16. Want to chat?
sections.content: Questions about Yumo Yumo Inc.? Reach us at info@yumoyumo.com, call +1 302-719-1468, or write to 8 The Green Suite B, Dover, DE 19901, United States.

terms.footer: Thanks for being part of Yumo Yumo — let's uncover the hidden and have fun doing it! 🫶✨

privacy.title: Yumo Yumo Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Hi friend! We really care about your privacy — like, a lot. This policy explains how we handle your info in the gentlest way possible.

sections.title: 1. What we collect (only the necessities)
content: Your wallet address (when you connect — it's public on blockchain anyway).
Receipts you upload (to give you those cool insights).
Basic device stuff (like which phone or browser you're using) so the app works smoothly.
Chats if you reach out to us.
We don't grab sensitive stuff unless it accidentally sneaks onto a receipt (please don't share things like health info!).

sections.title: 2. How we use your info
content: To show you hidden costs and cute spending breakdowns.
To calculate your well-deserved rewards.
To make the app better (using anonymized data only — no one knows it's you).
To keep everything safe and running.

sections.title: 3. Anonymization — our favorite magic trick
sections.content: When we improve the app or create general stats (like "dining costs in Bangkok"), we strip away anything that could point to you. Your receipts help everyone, but stay private.

sections.title: 4. Who sees your info?
content: Almost nobody!
Trusted helpers (cloud services, analytics) who promise to be good.
Blockchain (for rewards — that part is public by design).
Only if the law asks (very rare and boring).
We never sell your data. Pinky promise.

sections.title: 5. Blockchain is forever
sections.content: Once rewards hit the chain, they're public (wallet address + amounts). That's just how Web3 works — super transparent!

sections.title: 6. Keeping things safe
sections.content: We use strong locks and careful habits to protect your info. Nothing is 100% unbreakable, but we try our very best.

sections.title: 7. How long we keep stuff
sections.content: Only as long as we need it to help you or follow rules. Want something deleted? Just ask!

sections.title: 8. Your rights (you're in control)
content: Depending on where you live, you can:
See your data
Correct or delete it
Say "no thanks" to certain uses
Just ping us — we'll sort it with a smile.

sections.title: 9. We travel sometimes
sections.content: Your data might visit servers in other countries, but we always make sure they follow strict privacy rules.

sections.title: 10. No kids allowed
sections.content: Our app is for grown-ups only (18+). We don't collect info from kids.

sections.title: 11. Updates to this policy
sections.content: If we change anything important, we'll give you a heads-up. Keep using the app = you're okay with the new version.

sections.title: 12. Questions or cozy chats?
sections.content: For privacy questions, reach us at info@yumoyumo.com, call +1 302-719-1468, or write to 8 The Green Suite B, Dover, DE 19901, United States.

privacy.footer: Thank you for trusting us. We're here to make money stuff less confusing and more rewarding — all while keeping your privacy safe and sound. Big hug! 🤗✨

rejection.noBackground: Make sure the area around the receipt—where it starts and ends—is clearly visible. Place the receipt on a dark surface and leave space around all edges.
rejection.missingDocId: Receipt is missing required document identifier (invoice no, POS/terminal).

errors.sessionEnded: Session ended. Please log in again.

login.headline: Return to your Yumo Yumo profile and pick up where you left off.
login.subheadline: Sign in with the account you verified to continue into your receipt flow, rewards, and profile history.
login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Use your username and password to enter the app.
login.helper: If your email is not verified yet, we will route you to the verification screen automatically.
login.featureAccessBody: The same verified account works across the full Yumo Yumo app experience.
login.featureTrustBody: Verified email status stays attached to your session so access stays clean and controlled.
login.flowHint: Need a fresh start? You can reset your password without leaving this flow.
login.resetSuccess: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password.

register.headline: Create your Yumo Yumo account and start from a trusted profile.
register.subheadline: Your account starts with secure verification, country-aware defaults, and a clean path into the app.
register.featureSecureBody: Turnstile screens new signups before they ever touch the auth layer.
register.featureRewardsBody: Once your email is verified, the same account can flow directly into rewards and receipt mining.
register.featureProfileBody: Country and birth date are captured up front so the app starts with the right defaults.
register.title: Create account
register.description: Open a new account with your email, username, and country.
register.countryOtherNotice: Other countries aren't integrated yet, so the app can't be used on-chain and earns no rewards. Your country will be detected from your receipts, but uploads won't produce rewards.
register.countryLockNotice: Important: the country you choose now can't be changed later from settings.
register.localeHint: The language Yumbie will speak with you. You can change it later in settings.
register.verifyHint: We'll send a verification link right after signup. You'll need to confirm your email before entering the app.
register.legalRequired: You need to accept the terms and privacy notice to continue.
register.legalNotice: Your uploaded and usage-derived data may be anonymized or aggregated and used in insight, analytics, and reporting products.
register.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and accept the

verify.pendingBody: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Confirm it to unlock the app.
verify.pendingEmailFailedBody: Your account was created, but we could not send the verification email automatically. Use the resend button below.
verify.verifiedBody: Your account is now verified. You can continue straight into the app.
verify.expiredBody: This verification link has expired. Request a fresh email and try again.
verify.consumedBody: This link has already been used. If you still cannot access the app, request another verification email.
verify.invalidBody: The verification link is missing or invalid. Request a new one from this screen.

forgot.headline: Reset access without starting your account over.
forgot.subheadline: Enter your username or email and we will send a secure reset link to the inbox attached to your account.
forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: Request a password reset link and choose a new password from your inbox.
forgot.success: If that account exists, a password reset email is on the way.
forgot.hint: For privacy, this screen always shows the same success state even if the account is not found.
forgot.featureInboxBody: The reset link goes to the email already attached to the account.
forgot.featureSafeBody: Each reset link expires quickly and invalidates the previous one.

reset.headline: Set a new password and get back into Yumo Yumo.
reset.subheadline: Use the secure link from your inbox to choose a fresh password for your account.
reset.title: Create a new password
reset.description: Your new password should be at least 8 characters long.
reset.successBody: Your password has been changed successfully. You can sign in again now.
reset.invalidBody: This reset link is missing or no longer usable. Request a fresh one to continue.
reset.featureFastBody: Once the password is updated, you can sign straight back into the app.
reset.featureSecureBody: Reset links are single-use and time-limited for account safety.

privacy.title: Privacy Note:
privacy.description: Your receipt images are processed securely. We extract only the necessary information and do not store your images.

mine.blockchainNote: This receipt will be recorded on the blockchain
mine.successDescription: You've successfully mined hidden costs from this receipt
mine.rewardNote: Note: Rewards are not yet claimable. This feature will be available soon.

error.underReviewDesc: This receipt requires manual review because another receipt with the same total and date was found. Please wait for approval.
error.noReceiptId: No receipt ID returned from upload
error.analysisFailed: Failed to analyze receipt. Please try again.

mine.duplicateToastDesc: This receipt may have been uploaded before. ({id}…)
mine.duplicateNotSavedDesc: This receipt was uploaded before. Duplicate receipts are not saved.
mine.photoTooLargeDesc: Photo too large. Please try again; large photos will be compressed on the server.
mine.desktopOnlyDescription: To scan and upload receipts, please open the app on your phone.

breakdown.title: Hidden Cost Breakdown
breakdown.storeOperationsDesc: Store operations, staff, utilities, and payment processing
breakdown.supplyChainDesc: Supply chain, logistics, and distribution costs
breakdown.retailBrandDesc: Retail margin, brand, and marketing costs
breakdown.productValueDesc: The actual value of what you received
breakdown.exciseTaxDesc: Special consumption tax baked into the shelf price of tobacco, alcohol, or fuel. You pay it, but it is never itemised on the receipt.
breakdown.itemsSubtitle: Line items read from your receipt
breakdown.itemEmpty: No line items were read from this receipt.

modal.title: Data Contribution
modal.description: Processing your receipt on the server...
modal.verificationDesc: Checking for duplicates and validating data...

upload.title: Sealing your receipt
upload.sub: We send your file securely and prepare it for analysis.

ocr.title: Reading the text
ocr.sub: OCR extracts lines so we can understand what you paid for.

extract.title: Finding date & total
extract.sub: We locate the key numbers that anchor the whole story.

enrich.title: Identifying the merchant
enrich.sub: We match the business and category to enrich the analysis.

verify.title: Trust & anti-duplicate
verify.sub: We validate signals and protect rewards from duplicates.

reward.title: Calculating your reward
reward.sub: We convert hidden costs into cPoints and finalize your result.

dropzone.dropHere: Drop receipt image or PDF here

card.title: Upload Receipt
card.description: Drag and drop an image or PDF, or click to browse
card.clickToSelect: or click to select a file

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Understand where your money goes and how to save more
insights.emptyDesc: Mine a few receipts first to see your spending patterns and hidden costs.
insights.noMatchDesc: Try changing the time range or filters to see insights.

truthMetric.title: You paid more than product value.
truthMetric.subtitle: Hidden costs beyond the actual product value
truthMetric.disclaimer: Tax/VAT is shown separately. Hidden cost excludes state layer.

moneyFlow.title: Where your money went
moneyFlow.insightText: Out of {total} you paid: {product} product / {retail} retail / {system} system / {tax} tax.

timePatterns.title: Spend vs Hidden Cost Trend
timePatterns.subtitle: Track your spending and hidden costs over time.
timePatterns.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet — upload more receipts.
timePatterns.trendingUp: Hidden cost rate is trending upward.
timePatterns.trendingDown: Hidden cost rate is trending downward.
timePatterns.categoryAboveBaseline: {category} category is consistently above baseline ({categoryPercent}% vs {avgPercent}% average).
timePatterns.notEnoughForTrend: Not enough data for trend analysis

behaviorTrap.title: Behavior Trap Detector
behaviorTrap.subtitle: Hidden cost rate by day & time
behaviorTrap.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet — upload more receipts.
behaviorTrap.needReceipts: Need at least {count} receipts to detect patterns.

whatIf.title: What-if Simulator
whatIf.subtitle: Small reductions in hidden costs compound quickly.

spendingPulse.title: Spending Pulse
spendingPulse.subtitle: Track your spending pace and month-end forecast
spendingPulse.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet — upload more receipts.

trustLayer.title: Trust Layer
trustLayer.onlyVerified: Only verified receipts generate rewards. {count} low-confidence receipt{plural} flagged.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Complete social media tasks, challenges, and content creation to earn rewards
tasks.empty: No tasks found for selected filter

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.awarenessDesc: Total points are calculated from your verified receipt and quest contributions.
rewards.rewardDesc: Receipt points come from analyzed/verified receipts, and quest points come from completed tasks.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Top miners and hidden cost discoverers
leaderboard.subtitle: Hidden cost hunters
leaderboard.uploadToRank: Upload receipts to get on the board.

honor.tipPhoto: Frame the receipt clearly and fully; keep the camera in focus.
honor.tipCondition: Keep the receipt legible and intact; wet or crumpled receipts may not be read.
honor.tipBackground: Place the receipt on a dark, flat surface; leave space around the edges.

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailDialogDesc: Enter your new email and current password. Changing your email clears verification until you confirm the new address.
settings.emailDialogPasswordOnly: Enter your current password to save the email address in the field above.
settings.emailSaveHint: Type your email and tap Save email. We will send a verification link to that address.
settings.emailVerifyReminder: Check your inbox to verify your new email address.

error.emailInUse: That email is already in use
error.login: Please log in to save settings
error.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.passwordDesc: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
settings.appearanceDesc: Switch between light and dark theme
settings.soundDesc: Enabled by default (plays after your first tap)
settings.appLanguageHint: Language for menus, buttons, and app screens.
settings.cookiePreferencesDesc: Manage analytics and consent cookies for Yumo Yumo.

approvals.title: Pending Approvals
approvals.noPendingDesc: There are currently no pending receipts.
approvals.approveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve this receipt?
approvals.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this receipt?

rejected.title: Rejected Receipts
rejected.description: Receipts that were rejected by admin

allReceipts.title: All Receipts
allReceipts.description: Every receipt in the system, across all statuses

merchants.title: Merchants
merchants.description: Approve new businesses (set tier to candidate or verified).
merchants.noMerchantsDesc: No merchants match the selected filter.
merchants.rejectConfirm: Reject "{name}"? This will remove it from the list.

tooltip.candidate: Accept as candidate: listed for matching, standard reward
tooltip.verified: Accept as verified: listed and higher reward multiplier
tooltip.reject: Reject: remove from list (fişlerde tekrar çıkabilir)

reportBug.title: Report a bug
reportBug.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one option

correctionModal.title: See a field that's wrong?
correctionModal.subtitle: Fix it and earn extra reward (if it's correct).
correctionModal.successPending: Thanks — your correction was sent for review.
correctionModal.successApplied: Thanks — your correction was applied and sent for review.
correctionModal.multiSubtitle: Edit any fields you want, then send. You can fix several at once.

dateConfirm.title: Is this receipt's date right?
dateConfirm.body: We read the date as {date}, which is outside the current month, so it didn't earn a reward. If that's wrong, correct the date and we'll re-check it.
dateConfirm.futureTitle: This date can't be in the future
dateConfirm.futureBody: We read the date as {date}, which is in the future — a receipt can't be dated ahead, so it didn't earn a reward. Please enter the correct date.

receiptDetail.itemsEmpty: No line items were read from this receipt.
receiptDetail.brandHint: We couldn't read this product's brand — add it to track your favorites.
receiptDetail.duplicateBody: This receipt matches an earlier upload.
receiptDetail.deleteConfirmBody: This receipt will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

quests.selectGoalThisWeek: Select a goal for this week (you haven't yet).

evidence.title: Evidence & Confidence
evidence.visionJsonIntro: Vision JSON download button is below, in the first section.
evidence.visionJsonSectionDesc: Raw Vision API response (responses[0]); same content as receipt_vision_raw.

potentialReward.title: Your Potential Reward
potentialReward.description: Your potential reward has been calculated from this analysis.
potentialReward.rewardDesc: Save the analysis to add this receipt to your history.
potentialReward.honorAdminNote: Admin: Your honor score is not updated; this receipt would affect a normal user's Honor this way.

receiptScanner.desktopCameraHint: Live camera capture works on phones and tablets. To scan with your camera, open the app on your mobile device.
receiptScanner.desktopPickFileHint: You can still upload a receipt photo or PDF from this computer using Pick file below.
receiptScanner.uploadSubtitle: Take a photo with your camera or choose an image from your gallery.
receiptScanner.holdVertical: Hold phone vertically so the receipt fits.
receiptScanner.cameraPermissionHint: Enable camera permission in browser settings.
receiptScanner.expenseTypeSubtitle: This affects how the receipt is categorized and rewarded.
receiptScanner.expensePersonalDesc: Your own shopping — groceries, cafés, fuel, etc.
receiptScanner.expenseOtherDesc: Bulk receipts collected on behalf of a business or someone else.
receiptScanner.expenseTypeHint: You can switch the type anytime on the next step.

scanIntro.title: Before you scan
scanIntro.subtitle: A quick look at how Yumo Yumo turns your receipts into a clearer picture of your spending.
scanIntro.purposeDesc: Yumo Yumo helps you manage your everyday spending habits. Each receipt you add builds your spending history and sharpens your price comparisons.
scanIntro.expenseTypeDesc: Personal expenses are your own shopping and earn the full reward. Other expenses are receipts you collect for a business or someone else — they are saved with a reduced reward and stay out of your personal price baselines.
scanIntro.dateRuleTitle: Receipts from the current month earn rewards
scanIntro.dateRuleDesc: Add receipts within the month of purchase to earn rewards. Receipts from an earlier month are still saved and counted in your spending history, and they keep your records complete.

vectorReceipt.seeYouAgain: We look forward to seeing you again

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines
photoGuidelines.receiptUprightDesc: Place the receipt on a flat surface and hold your camera perpendicular to the receipt.
photoGuidelines.entireReceiptDesc: The full receipt must be in frame with no edges cut off. If too close, move the camera away from the receipt.
photoGuidelines.cleanBackgroundDesc: No other objects should be around or on the receipt. Place it on a clean, flat surface.
photoGuidelines.sufficientLightDesc: Please ensure there is sufficient lighting. Avoid direct light sources.
photoGuidelines.sharpFocusedDesc: Hold your camera steady and focus on the receipt. The photo should not be blurry.
photoGuidelines.marginsDesc: Leave some space around the receipt (top, bottom, left, and right). The receipt should not touch the edges of the photo.

compactPieChart.hoverDetails: Hover over chart segments to see details

miningComplete.receiptAnalyzed: Your receipt has been successfully analyzed!

dashboard.noNotificationsBody: Daily notes and account movement will appear here.
dashboard.noEventsBody: Calendar, bill, travel, and event notes will appear here.
dashboard.shoppingEmptyTitle: Your shopping list is empty for now
dashboard.shoppingEmptyBody: When you start scanning receipts, Yumo will fill this in for you
dashboard.verifyTitle: Contribute to the vision, earn prizes
dashboard.verifyBody: Help build Yumo's decentralized price intelligence. Each verification sharpens the network — and earns prizes along the way.
dashboard.verifyEmptyTitle: No tasks to verify right now
dashboard.verifyEmptyBody: Yumo will fill this in as new receipts arrive.
dashboard.verifyCorrectHint: Type the merchant's full name as on the receipt
dashboard.servicesEmptyBody: Add recurring services like electricity, internet, or digital subscriptions and Yumo will remind you of due dates.
dashboard.servicesReminderHint: Reminders arrive 3 and 1 days before due date
dashboard.servicesStepNameHint: You pick the brand — Yumo doesn't collect logos, only stores the name you write
dashboard.shoppingHintMatch: When you upload a receipt, Yumo auto-matches your list and shows price differences across stores

need.high: The items on this receipt are essential life necessities.
need.mid: A mix of needs and wants.
need.low: This receipt leans toward pleasure, luxury, or desire.

mood.high: This receipt behaves like a reward, escape, or relaxation ritual.
mood.mid: A slight mood influence, but not a full reward.

inflation.high: Price has deviated heavily from the product's real value. Intermediary layers are dominant.
inflation.mid: There is a noticeable markup, but still within reasonable bounds.
inflation.low: Price and value are fairly close.

social.high: This receipt is part of a moment spent outside, with others.
social.mid: A balance between social context and practicality.
social.low: This receipt points to home life or personal digital shopping.

hiddenCost.high: A large share of what you paid does not go to the product itself; intermediaries, brand, and tax layers are thick.
hiddenCost.mid: Hidden cost exists but product value still holds a meaningful share.
hiddenCost.low: Most of what you paid goes to the product itself.

oneLine.workspaceHunter: This {merchant} receipt is not just a coffee; it behaves like workspace rent, cool air, and a break cost.
oneLine.eveningRewarder: A small evening reward ritual from {merchant}.
oneLine.routineRestocker: {merchant} is part of the weekly rhythm; restocking and keeping the home running.
oneLine.socialConnector: This {merchant} receipt is not just spending; it's a trace of a moment shared outside.
oneLine.inflationVictim: At {merchant}, basic needs are bought but price layers overshadow the product itself.
oneLine.impulseNomad: {merchant} is the product of an impulse decision; not on the need list, but it caught the mood.
oneLine.needDominant: This {merchant} receipt is a practical answer to basic needs.
oneLine.moodDominant: This {merchant} receipt carries the trace of a reward or relaxation moment.
oneLine.inflationDominant: At {merchant}, the gap between price and product value is striking.
oneLine.socialDominant: This {merchant} receipt is part of out-of-home life and social context.
oneLine.hiddenCostDominant: On this {merchant} receipt, a significant share of the total goes to layers outside the product.
oneLine.fallback: This {merchant} receipt carries behavioral layers worth reading.

narrative.workspaceHunter: This {merchant} stop is not really about the drink; it's the signal that you want to pack up your desk and move there. The coffee isn't the main product — it's the price of a workspace permit.
narrative.eveningRewarder: After the weight of the day, this small thing from {merchant} looks like a moment of giving yourself permission. Not a reward — a breath.
narrative.routineRestocker: A {merchant} run keeps the rhythm going; but if anything outside the list snuck in, even routines have their little escapes.
narrative.socialConnector: This {merchant} receipt isn't just food or drink; it's a trace of being at the same table with others, conversation, and the feeling of being outside.
narrative.inflationVictim: Basic items come off the shelves at {merchant}, but a significant slice of what you paid doesn't reach the product itself; shelves, logistics, and brand step in between.
narrative.impulseNomad: This {merchant} receipt is an unplanned stop. It wasn't needed, but something in that moment caught you. Mood sometimes jumps ahead of the list.
narrative.fallback: Let's look at what this {merchant} receipt actually says between the lines.
narrative.needAndInflation: Even though it's a basic need, price layers are quite thick.
narrative.moodAndSocial: This reward also carries social context; not alone, lived outside.
narrative.hiddenCostAndNeed: Hidden cost is high but this is a necessity purchase; hard to avoid.
narrative.socialAndMood: The social setting is also a source of relaxation and reward.
narrative.highRatio: {pct}% of what you paid does not go to the product itself.
narrative.eveningMood: Evening timing gives this purchase a reward character.

goals.title: Goals
goals.noActions: No open tasks right now. Continue from the Tasks screen.
goals.noQuests: No incomplete quests. New receipts or weekly rotation will show here.
goals.noFinancialGoals: No active goals saved. Add one or tap the + above.

trustCard.title: Receipt quality
trustCard.desc: Clear receipts raise your trust score and unlock better rewards.

trustSheet.title: How to improve your receipt quality
trustSheet.tip1: Make sure all edges of the receipt are visible. Cut-off corners prevent OCR from reading the total amount.
trustSheet.tip2: Upload a real photo of the receipt, not a screenshot. Screenshots lack required metadata.
trustSheet.tip3: Date, total, and merchant name must be visible. All three together trigger reward calculation.
trustSheet.tip4: Avoid blurry or dark photos. Poor lighting is the biggest factor in reducing OCR confidence.

financialSheet.title: Add financial goal
financialSheet.desc: Goal is saved via /api/goals (same data as Insights).
financialSheet.saveError: Could not save. Check your session and connection.

rewardsPage.title: Season Rewards
rewardsPage.earnReceiptDesc: Season XP · Account XP · Contribution · cPoints
rewardsPage.earnVerifyDesc: Verify others' receipts → earn cPoints + Season XP
rewardsPage.invitesSubtitle: Activity and earnings of the people you invited

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.emptyDesc: New updates will appear here when they arrive.

bills.title: My Bills
bills.heroEmpty: Add your first item — I'll show your payment status here.
bills.emptySubscriptionsDesc: Add Netflix, Spotify or any recurring digital service to keep them in one place.
bills.emptyDesc: Add your bills and I'll remind you when they're due.
bills.sampleHint: If uploaded, the system will extract amount and date for the first record.
bills.paymentDayHint: If the month is shorter, shifts to the last day (e.g. Feb 28/29)

rewardCard.title: Potential Reward
rewardCard.subtitle: cPoints earned for this receipt
rewardCard.firstMerchantBonus: You were the first to upload this merchant; a thank-you bonus (1.2x) was applied because it was verified.

partial.title: Payment confirmed — {pct}% of the reward for now
partial.fullEstimate: Estimated full reward after itemized receipt: {amount} cPoints
partial.followUp: Upload the itemized store receipt listing products to claim the rest of your reward.

itemizedDialog.title: Itemized store receipt
itemizedDialog.description: Upload a receipt that lists products and matches the same date, total, and merchant as this slip. The remaining reward is added to your slip record.
itemizedDialog.mismatch: This receipt did not match your slip. Check that the date, total, and merchant name are the same.

noReward.pos_slip: Card slips prove payment; upload the itemized store receipt or e-invoice for the full reward path.
noReward.payment_receipt: Payment is confirmed on this slip, but itemized proof of expense is missing — upload the store receipt or e-invoice.
noReward.order_list: Order lists and unpaid tabs are recorded but do not qualify for rewards.
noReward.no_payment_proof: Payment is not confirmed on this document, so no reward applies.
noReward.out_of_current_month: Only receipts dated in the current calendar month are accepted for rewards.
noReward.missing_receipt_date: Receipt date could not be verified for the current-month rule.
noReward.document_rejected: This document type is not accepted as proof of expense.
noReward.vision_failed: The image could not be analyzed. Please retake the photo and try again.
noReward.reward_pending_verification: Reward could not be calculated yet. It may update after line verification.
noReward.amount_inconsistent: The total doesn't match the listed items, so the reward is on hold. Check the amount and correct it if it's wrong.
noReward.duplicate_same_user: You already uploaded this receipt. Duplicate receipts do not earn rewards.
noReward.duplicate_other_user: This receipt was already uploaded. Duplicate receipts do not earn rewards.
noReward.generic: This document was saved without a reward.

categoryPicker.title: Which category is this receipt?
categoryPicker.subtitle: We couldn't determine the category automatically. Please pick the closest one so we can value it correctly.
categoryPicker.successToast: Thanks — your pick will be reviewed.
categoryPicker.errorToast: Could not submit. Please try again.
categoryPicker.reviewNote: Your choice goes to review and is applied after approval.
